# kCGPDFXInfo | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ kCGPDFXInfo ](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxinfo)

-  kCGPDFXInfo 

Global Variable# kCGPDFXInfo

iOS 14.0+iPadOS 14.0+Mac Catalyst 14.0+macOS 10.4+tvOS 14.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 7.0+

```
let kCGPDFXInfo: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxinfo#Discussion)

A human-readable text string containing additional information or comments about the intended target device or production condition. This key is required if the value of [`kCGPDFXOutputConditionIdentifier`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxoutputconditionidentifier) does not specify a standard production condition. It is optional otherwise. If present, the value of this key must be a [`CFString`](/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString) object.

## [See Also](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxinfo#see-also)

### [Output Intent Keys](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxinfo#Output-Intent-Keys)

[`let kCGPDFXOutputIntentSubtype: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxoutputintentsubtype)The output intent subtype. This key is required.[`let kCGPDFXOutputConditionIdentifier: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxoutputconditionidentifier)[`let kCGPDFXOutputCondition: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxoutputcondition)A text string identifying the intended output device or production condition in a human-readable form.[`let kCGPDFXRegistryName: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxregistryname)[`let kCGPDFXDestinationOutputProfile: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgpdfxdestinationoutputprofile)
